ab: Tanobake, kadrowanga bava naiyana, lwalangaia bava.
ch: W:Tanobake家裡沒有米酒了，你去買米酒。
en: Kacaw, our home is out of rice wine, please go and buy some.

ab: yakaiyana sadalrila ikai kwbaw, asi langai!
ch: M:廚房裡還有一瓶，不用買吧!
en: There is still one bottle left in the kitchen, so there is no need to buy one!

ab: kadro ahoa sa dalrila, mwa na angivalre lwangai akoadrosa.
ch: W:一瓶不夠，再去買兩瓶回來。
en: One bottle is not enough for me, go and buy two more back.

ab: ai lwangazako bava, kiyalangalangai nomi?
ch: m:我要買米酒，你們有賣嗎?
en: I am looking for rice wine. Do you have any rice wine?

ab: eene, yakai! ai ’iya so langai?
en: Yes! How many bottles do you need?

ab: ai langazako drosa ka dalrili bava si langaiyana sa awtiyana ka agai.
ch: m:我要買兩瓶，還要買一包米。
en: I want two bottles and a pack of rice.

ab: ikai niya agai, ai langaiyana so sa manema?
ch: w:米在這裡，你還需要什麼嗎?
en: Here is the rice, what else do you need?

ab: ai lwangaiyana ako batoko, yakai nomi?
en: I want some eggs too, do you have some?

ab: kiyalangai male’engenga ki batoko nai.
en: We are out of eggs.

ab: ai lrangazako sa ki’ingi.
en: I want to buy some clothes.

ab: ai langai so mikakwakwa?
en: What kind of clothes do you like?

ab: ai langazako ki’ingi ka edrekai hasere.
en: I want to buy the clothes with short sleeves.

ab: mikakwa kai direrelre?
en: How about this red one?

ab: yakaiyana kwadra maela ka kolraw?
en: Do you have another color?

ab: yakaiyana nai ’olri’olri si masalese.
en: We have white and blue ones too.

ab: na bwaiyaili ki’ingi ka masalasa.
ch: m:請給我一件藍色的衣服。
en: Please give me the clothes in blue.

ab: Tanobake amwa so ino kwasa? mwaongdo so?
ch: W:Tanobake你剛剛去哪裡了?你去運動嗎?
en: kacaw, where have you been just now? Did you go exercising?

ab: ini, amwa ko alribolo ki kaingoli langai sa laceng.
en: No, I went grocery shopping for my grandma.

ab: iya! wacogo so lomaong? na karedede takane aga.
ch: W:這樣啊，你晚上有沒有空?要不要和我一起吃飯。
en: No wonder! Are you available at night? Would you like to have a meal with me?

ab: ini, ai langzako sa ki’ingi.
en: No, I want to buy some clothes.

ab: iya! na to’ala ko moswa.
en: Then, I will go with you.

ab: mwadringadringaza! thaino sabetebete ka laceng?
ch: m:你好，請問這把菜多少錢?
en: Hello, how much is this bunch of vegetables?

ab: sabetebete ka laceng ka maosalre ka ’aiso.
en: The vegetables are $20 for a bunch.

ab: thaino kai borasi?
en: How much are these sweet potatoes?

ab: matolrolo ka ’aiso ka sa tingiting ka borasi.
en: Sweet potatoes are thirty dollars for a pound.

ab: na bwayiyaili drosa betebete ka laceng si sa tingiting ka borasi.
ch: m:請給我兩把菜和一斤地瓜。
en: Please give me two bunches of vegetables and a pound of sweet potatoes.
